text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just before summer camp comes to an end...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehe! ☆ Only for a moment, but yeah!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I call it the Sea Spray ☆ Splitter! And with that,
I've cleared my original objective for this summer
camp!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm going at full power! With my new move, I'm
gonna win and win and keep on winning!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I better not catch you peeping! ☆ Just kidding! I
know you wouldn't. ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna win and win and keep on winning.
That's why I'm gonna get stronger!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Even the president came by to compliment me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm doing the right thing... right? So why do I feel
like...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I just have to focus on winning. As long as I can
do that... I know my dream will come true.
